overall.description: A first-person walk through a futuristic cyberpunk city environment from Cyberpunk 2077, beginning at a sunlit industrial intersection and progressing through covered walkways, ascending green pedestrian paths, and commercial districts toward a tunnel entrance. The footage features high-quality ray-traced lighting with vibrant neon signs contrasting against bright daylight.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban intersection with industrial district backdrop

events.description: enters covered walkway under building overhang, transitioning from open intersection to sheltered sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking across the intersection toward the covered sidewalk on the right side of the street

notable_agents.action: green car driving across the intersection from left to right

entered.detail: tall red and white industrial chimneys emitting white smoke into the sky
tall contemporary skyscraper with reflective blue glass facade
yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing markings on asphalt
ground-level vent releasing white steam onto the street

segments.scene_description: The clip opens at a bright sunlit intersection in a futuristic industrial district. Tall smokestacks rise in the distance while a modern glass tower stands on the right. The camera crosses the street, passing a green vehicle and steam vents, approaching a covered walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered sidewalk beneath elevated highway structure

events.description: lighting shifts from bright direct sunlight to shadowed area under building overhang and highway structure

agents.ego_description: walking along the covered sidewalk parallel to the street, moving into the shadow of the overpass

entered.detail: massive concrete highway overpass spanning across the street ahead
concrete retaining wall covered in colorful graffiti tags and street art
green painted metal railings lining the edge of the pedestrian path
distinctive green painted walkway with white grid lines

segments.scene_description: Moving under the building overhang, the scene becomes darker with mixed lighting. The green pedestrian path begins here, bordered by metal railings and graffiti-covered walls. The massive concrete highway structure looms ahead as the camera continues forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: ascending pedestrian walkway between dense urban buildings

events.description: path begins gentle ascent as it climbs toward the overpass structure
pink illuminated cherry blossom tree becomes visible ahead on the right side of the path

agents.ego_description: walking uphill on the green pedestrian path, following other pedestrians toward the overpass

notable_agents.action: person in blue jacket walking ahead on the green path
person in bright pink pants walking ahead toward the overpass

entered.detail: tree with pink blossoms decorated with purple fairy lights and digital effects
wide concrete stairs leading up to a building entrance on the right
large illuminated commercial advertisements and holographic displays on building facades

segments.scene_description: The path ascends gently between dense buildings toward the massive overpass structure. A distinctive pink cherry blossom tree with illuminated decorations appears on the right. Other pedestrians walk ahead as the camera moves through this narrow corridor with neon signs visible on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with outdoor cafes and shops

events.description: pedestrian density increases near the outdoor cafe seating area
passing the pink tree and entering the final approach to the tunnel underpass

agents.ego_description: walking past the cafe area and continuing toward the tunnel entrance with moderate foot traffic

notable_agents.action: person in orange outfit sitting at outdoor cafe table under green awning

entered.detail: small restaurant with green canopy, outdoor seating, and illuminated signage
vertical illuminated sign with Japanese characters and blue neon lighting
dark underpass entrance with light visible at the far end

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a more commercial area with a cafe featuring a green awning and outdoor seating on the right. Pedestrian traffic increases as the camera approaches the tunnel entrance ahead. The pink tree falls behind as the path continues toward the dark underpass.

scene_state.functional_zone: tunnel approach with dense commercial signage and underpass

events.description: approaching and entering the dark tunnel entrance with illuminated billboards overhead

agents.ego_description: walking toward and entering the tunnel entrance with groups of pedestrians ahead

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians walking ahead into the tunnel underpass

entered.detail: large suspended digital billboards displaying advertisements spanning across the street overhead
metal roll-down security doors on closed storefronts with graffiti

segments.scene_description: The final segment approaches the tunnel entrance where the lighting becomes predominantly artificial. Large digital billboards hang overhead displaying advertisements. The camera moves toward the dark tunnel mouth with other pedestrians, passing closed shops with metal shutters on the right.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright, sunlit industrial intersection into the artificial glow of a dense commercial underpass. It begins by crossing a wide street past towering smokestacks and a glass tower, moving through steam vents toward the shadow of a covered walkway. As the camera passes under the building overhang, the environment shifts into a darker, narrow corridor where a green pedestrian path leads past graffiti-covered walls and toward a massive concrete highway structure. The scene then ascends through a corridor of neon signs and a glowing pink cherry blossom tree before opening into a commercial district featuring a green-awning cafe and increased pedestrian traffic. Finally, the lighting transitions from daylight to predominantly artificial as the camera passes under large digital billboards and closed metal shutters, moving steadily toward the dark mouth of a tunnel.
